notes: IETF standard MIBs for IF-MIB interface discovery and HC counter polling. Vendor private MIBs may be placed under vendor/. Huawei per-AC traffic uses standard IF-MIB on the sub-interface ifIndex; H3C per-service-instance traffic uses the private HH3C-EVC-MIB (hh3cEvcSrvInstStatInfoTable, OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.25506.2.106.1.4) indexed by (ifIndex, serviceInstanceId) — symbolic OIDs in app/services/mib_registry.py::HH3C_EVC.
